_publications._publicationTitle: Forward genetic screen for malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor formation identifies new genes and pathways driving tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: shRNA-mediated FOXR2 knockdown in STS26T and S462-TY cell lines confirmed the FOXR2 TALEN results in vitro
details: shRNA-mediated FOXR2 knockdown in STS26T and S462-TY cell lines confirmed the FOXR2 TALEN results in vitro
